examples: She pulled away when he tried to kiss her.
He pulled away from the relationship.
He pulled away from the parking spot.
He pulled away from the group.
The car pulled away just in time.
She pulled away from the curb.
They pulled away from each other.
The train pulled away from the station.
She pulled away from his embrace.
example_translate: Она отстранилась, когда он попытался её поцеловать.
pull away.synonyms:
Отъезжать, отходить (о транспорте) - depart, pull out, move away
Отстраняться (эмоционально, физически) - distance oneself, withdraw
